nasb.text: And Jesus, crying out with a loud voice, said, “Father, into Your hands I commit My spirit.” Having said this, He breathed His last.

esv.text: Then Jesus, calling out with a loud voice, said, “Father, into your hands I commit my spirit!” And having said this he breathed his last.

cnv.text: 耶穌大聲呼叫：“父啊，我把我的靈魂交在你手裡。”說了這話，氣就斷了。

ccb.text: 耶稣大声喊着说：“父啊，我将我的灵魂交在你手中。”说完，就断气了。

csbs.text: 耶稣大声呼唤：“父啊，我把我的灵魂交托在你手中。”说完这话，就断了气。
